properties.name: Project
properties.description: A NaCl-managed project root with config.yaml, boards/, and graph-infra/. The active project is the analyst-tool working scope.
properties.bounded_context: External-facing contract (routes + WS) for the analyst-tool

properties.name: Board
properties.description: An Excalidraw board file (.excalidraw) that visualises a slice of the project graph. Identified by relative path from boards/.
properties.bounded_context: External-facing contract (routes + WS) for the analyst-tool

properties.name: BoardMeta
properties.description: Persistent sidecar metadata for a Board (kind, sync status, last sync time, owning use-case). Stored alongside the .excalidraw file.
properties.bounded_context: External-facing contract (routes + WS) for the analyst-tool

properties.name: Snapshot
properties.description: An immutable point-in-time capture of a Board scene JSON, used for autosave / restore / diff.
properties.bounded_context: External-facing contract (routes + WS) for the analyst-tool

properties.name: Run
properties.description: A single skill execution lifecycle (regenerate / sync / analyze / render-md). Tracks phase, logs, exit code, and output board.

properties.name: BatchOperation
properties.description: A grouped multi-target skill invocation (e.g., re-render all UC boards). Aggregates child Runs and exposes overall progress.

properties.name: RenderableBoard
properties.description: The deterministic intermediate representation produced by a renderer from a Cypher query — input to Excalidraw scene materialisation.

properties.name: ResolvedConfig
properties.description: The merged, validated runtime configuration for a project (registry → cwd → env precedence). Drives port/host/boardsDir wiring.
properties.bounded_context: External-facing contract (routes + WS) for the analyst-tool
